title: rubus × septimus
intro: Rubus × septimus, also known as the Black Raspberry, is a hybrid of the Rubus idaeus and Rubus occidentalis species, characterized by its edible fruits and thorny canes. The plant contains anthocyanins and ellagic acid, which exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Black Raspberry have been shown to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and possess anti-cancer properties. Black Raspberry is often used in herbal preparations such as jams, jellies, and supplements, making it a popular choice for maintaining overall health and well-being.
